arts.ttl: Juventus and Randal Kolo Muani: Why the Transfer Announcement is Delayed
arts.sum: As the January transfer window progresses, Juventus fans are eagerly awaiting the official announcement regarding the signing of Randal Kolo Muani from Paris Saint-Germain. However, despite widespread anticipation, the confirmation of this transfer has yet to materialize, leaving many to wonder about the reasons behind the delay. arts.ttl: AC Milan 'give up pursuit of Man United outcast Marcus Rashford to focus on signing Kyle Walker from Man City'
arts.sum: Serie A rules dictate that top flight Italian clubs can only register one British player in their squad per year. This means they are only able to sign one of Rashford or Walker.
